name: market-signal-monitor
title: Market Signal Monitor
summary: Turn externally collected, source-linked market signals into a bounded daily brief.

inputs.name: signal_url
inputs.description: Trusted endpoint returning source-linked signal status/evidence.

schedule.rationale: Produce one bounded brief each morning.

evidence.name: source-linked-signals
evidence.description: Dated signals with canonical source URLs and collection metadata.

expected_artifacts.name: market-brief
expected_artifacts.description: Claims, source links, confidence, counter-evidence, and open questions.

expected_artifacts.name: run-journal
expected_artifacts.description: Durable execution and effect audit trail.

safety.rationale: The monitor summarizes evidence and must not execute financial or publishing actions.
safety.secrets: Collection credentials stay outside the payload; redact personal or licensed data.
